rbaHistory.note: First cut since Nov 2020 — CPI back in 2-3% band
Held; trimmed mean CPI above target
Held; Q1 CPI surprised to upside

news.title: Trump move rocks Aussie sharemarket
news.snippet: Gold miners and tech stocks have dragged the ASX 200 down, but oil has soared after US President Donald Trump ordered a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: Private credit’s ‘naked swimmers’ are surfacing
news.snippet: The private credit sector is experiencing a rush of redemptions that has led to comparisons with the sub-prime mortgage crisis in 2008. Can it sink the financial system?

news.title: ASX bounces back on renewed Iran talk hopes; Qantas, Westpac fall
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket opened higher, tracking Wall Street gains as Donald Trump raised hopes for an Iran deal even as a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz took effect.

news.title: ‘Clock is ticking’: Grim recession warning
news.snippet: An “inflation mentality” that could soon flood the Australian economy has sparked fears of an imminent recession, a leading economist warns.

news.title: Albo flags move on controversial Aussie tax
news.snippet: Anthony Albanese has given the strongest indication yet Labor could seek to scrap a controversial housing tax break at next month’s budget.

news.title: Dreaded number that could start a recession
news.snippet: Almost one million Aussies could be jobless, inflation may almost double and two sectors face being decimated if the price of oil spikes to a certain figure.

news.title: Super Netball expansion delayed as TV talks drag on
Who says money can’t buy happiness? Meet the unabashedly happy Mrs Sánchez Bezos
news.snippet: As half of an unfathomably powerful couple, Amazon founder Jeff Bezos’ wife, Lauren Sánchez Bezos, seems to have influenced the uber-rich to stop apologising, and start enjoying themselves.

news.title: ‘Shock’ super collapse costs Aussies $160m
news.snippet: The hopes and dreams of 660 hard-working Aussies have been crushed after a superannuation scheme collapsed into liquidation.

news.title: Critica met test lands 81% magnet rare earths recovery in WA
news.snippet: Critica Limited has lifted pilot plant rare earths recoveries for its Jupiter project in WA, hitting 71% TREO and 81% for the valuable magnet rare earths oxides.

news.title: Fewer flights, $800m fuel blowout as Iran crisis hits Qantas
news.snippet: The airline’s fuel prices have raced higher, while it has trimmed domestic routes and announced weaker investment.

news.title: Lululemon’s athletic wear faces probe into ‘forever chemicals’
news.snippet: The global apparel retailer is being probed for the presence of chemicals linked to health problems.
